author: Charles the Thobe
message: update-subtrees.sh: provide simple linear commit history instead of merge commits

author: Marcus Minhorst
message:
Added release script

Overhauls CI to not use github triggers, as they seem to be incredibly unreliable

author: Boondorl
message:
Looped Thinker list destruction on clean up

This will keep looping the lists until nothing has been destroyed, ensuring it's all-encompassing.

author: Marcus Minhorst
message: Updater does not take up space when hidden

author: Marcus Minhorst
message: Fix CONSOLE_MODE flag for some compilers

author: Boondorl
message:
Ignore missing SNDINFO defs from the internal pk3

These are often defined in case an outside resource needs it, so don't report these.

author: Marcus Minhorst
message: Allow for collapsable banner, tweaking deafult sizes

author: Ricardo Luís Vaz Silva
message:
fix crash

also fixes memory leak from `>` instead of `>=`
